channel.title: algorithm on CONMAJIA
channel.description: Recent content in algorithm on CONMAJIA

item.title: Natural-Imitating Random Number Generator
item.description: Initiated on May 12, 2012, codename EMP1. Random number generator, or RNG, is one of the most fundamental ingredients of all computers and programming languages, in the form of electronic or software modules. RNGs were invented long before mechanical or electronic computers before there were symbols for writing numbers. Ancient civilizations used flipping coins or rolling dices to generate independent random numbers. The most antique dices found in Iraq and Iran were made 5,000 years ago.
